steps.action: Drop multi-entity PDF in default Identity mode
steps.expected: Flow reaches preview with identity PII marked for removal and money kept
steps.observed: Preview loaded with Removing=10 and Keeping=4 (Dollar amounts×4 kept)

steps.action: Download redacted PDF and inspect output page image
steps.expected: Identity PII black-barred; dollar amounts legible
steps.observed: SSN/address/email black-barred while $85,420.00 and $3,500.50 remained visible

steps.action: Verify completion screen
steps.expected: Done screen shows output filename and local-processing trust message
steps.observed: Done screen showed 'fixture-multi-entity-redacted.pdf' and local-only trust text

evidence.network: No API/XHR calls observed; only localhost Vite/module and pdf.worker script loads

assertions.title: Complete happy path — Full redaction mode

steps.action: Select Full redaction and drop multi-entity PDF
steps.expected: All entity types including MONEY show as REDACT
steps.observed: Preview showed Removing=14 and Keeping=0, including Dollar amounts×4 under Removing

steps.action: Download output and inspect rendered page image
steps.expected: Black bars over all detected entities, including dollar amounts
steps.observed: Money values were black-barred in output image in addition to identity fields

steps.action: Verify completion screen appears
steps.expected: Done state renders with output filename
steps.observed: Done screen rendered with 'fixture-multi-entity-redacted.pdf'

evidence.network: No API/XHR calls observed; local script/worker requests only

assertions.title: Mode switch mid-review updates highlights and counts

steps.action: Load PDF in Identity mode
steps.expected: Money appears as kept and counts reflect KEEP bucket
steps.observed: Before switch: Removing=10, Keeping=4 with Dollar amounts×4 in Keeping

steps.action: Switch sidebar mode to Full redact
steps.expected: Detection reruns, money changes to REDACT, counts update
steps.observed: After switch: Removing=14, Keeping=0; Dollar amounts moved to Removing

evidence.network: No API/XHR calls observed; local module reloads only

steps.action: Drop encrypted PDF
steps.expected: Password modal appears
steps.observed: Password modal displayed with Enter password input and Unlock action

steps.action: Submit wrong password then correct password
steps.expected: Wrong password shows inline error; correct password continues to preview
steps.observed: Wrong password showed "Incorrect password. Please try again." then correct password advanced to preview

steps.action: Download and finish flow
steps.expected: Pipeline reaches done screen with output file
steps.observed: Done screen rendered with 'fixture-encrypted-redacted.pdf'

evidence.network: No API/XHR calls observed; local PDF worker/module requests only

assertions.title: Start over from preview screen clears all state

steps.action: At preview, toggle multiple entity decisions
steps.expected: Review state reflects toggles before reset
steps.observed: Counts changed from default to Removing=8 / Keeping=6 after toggling highlights

steps.action: Click Start over from preview
steps.expected: Return to clean drop screen
steps.observed: App returned to drop screen with mode cards and file picker only

steps.action: Drop different PDF after reset
steps.expected: Fresh detection with no old-state contamination
steps.observed: New file processed independently with its own counts (Removing=4, Keeping=1)

assertions.title: Start over from done screen clears all state

steps.action: Complete full-redaction flow to done screen
steps.expected: Done screen shown after successful output generation
steps.observed: Done screen displayed for 'fixture-second-redacted.pdf'

steps.action: Click Redact another document
steps.expected: Return to clean drop screen
steps.observed: Returned to initial drop UI with no prior review artifacts

steps.action: Upload new PDF after done reset
steps.expected: Fresh independent processing
steps.observed: New document produced baseline counts (Removing=10, Keeping=4) with no inherited toggles

steps.action: Navigate pages with next/prev and thumbnail buttons
steps.expected: Page indicator remains accurate through navigation
steps.observed: Indicator correctly changed across Page 1 of 3, Page 2 of 3, and Page 3 of 3 using next, prev, and thumbnails

steps.action: Click sidebar entity row for cross-page type (Phone number) while on another page
steps.expected: Navigate to target page and scroll entity into view
steps.observed: Clicking Phone number row moved from Page 2 to Page 3; focused highlight rect was within viewport bounds

assertions.title: Error recovery without losing position in flow

steps.action: Drop non-PDF file from drop screen
steps.expected: Clear error message and remain on drop screen
steps.observed: Displayed "Only PDF files are supported..." and stayed on drop screen

steps.action: Drop oversized PDF (>50 MB)
steps.expected: Size-limit error and still remain functional on drop screen
steps.observed: Displayed "File exceeds the 50 MB size limit..." and drop UI remained interactive

steps.action: Drop valid PDF immediately after errors
steps.expected: Flow proceeds normally to preview
steps.observed: Valid file processed successfully to preview (Removing=10, Keeping=4)

evidence.network: Local script/worker GET requests on localhost; no backend/API calls triggered

frictions.description: Drop UI uses a hidden file input; uploading via the visible "browse your files" control fails in automation because it is not an <input>.
frictions.resolution: Used direct upload to input[type=file] in the same session for all file drops.

frictions.description: Initial download-path flag was ignored because agent-browser daemon was already running for the session.
frictions.resolution: Closed and reopened the same named browser session with --download-path pointing to the assigned evidence directory.
